problem id: 9adc9406
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3)

examples:
  01000100 -> 00100000
  00100110 -> 00110000
  00001100 -> 01100000
  00011101 -> 11101000
  00011110 -> 11110000
  10011100 -> 11100000
  00110000 -> 10000000
  00001110 -> 01110000
  01100010 -> 00010000
  01101110 -> 01110000

query: 11010110
predicted answer: 10110000
